objective_feature_calibration.policy: a number must be supported by features that recently beat baseline; weak feature consensus is penalized

zero_hit_recovery.reason: last settled prediction did not have Top15 zero hit

slump_recall_coverage.reason: recent prediction maturity is not in emergency recall mode

top9_leakage_lock.target: keep validated high-hit signals inside rank 1-9 instead of leaking to rank 10-15
top9_leakage_lock.policy: critical month mode pulls validated rank 10-25 recall signals into the front nine; normal mode pulls rank 10-15 only

failed_strong_quarantine.policy: failed strong-single and short-pack numbers cannot return to the front without objective edge, hit-through edge, cross validation and stability

score_saturation_breaker.reason: top15 scores still have enough separation

low_probability_track.purpose: 5不中、10不中、15不中暫避與誤中檢討
low_probability_track.rule: 低機率只做暫避研究，不參與高機率推薦排序。

drift_audit.warning: Distribution drift is a model-risk signal, not proof of a predictable pattern.

release_assurance.meaning: Reliability assurance only; it does not guarantee lottery prediction accuracy.
